title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at FM Logistic India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at FM Logistic India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
FM Logistic India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FM Logistic India:
FM Logistic India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FM Logistic India!
